crisis: Displacement from Venezuela to Costa Rica

tavily.answer: Recent earthquakes in Venezuela have led to significant displacement, with thousands reported missing and injured. The death toll has risen to at least 589, according to the latest reports. The international community, including the U.S., has mobilized to provide aid and support rescue operations. Essential infrastructure damage has complicated aid delivery, but efforts are ongoing to reach those affected. The situation remains critical, with ongoing search and rescue operations in affected areas.
